title: Presignals Durability Overlay
description: Working Durability Overlay for versions over 1.21 with the mod variants cit.
body:
Presignals Durability Overlay for any version which [Variants Cit](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit) Works With.

Requires [Variants Cit](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit) Due to [Cit Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) not being updated anymore.

The armor Will change colour depending on the durability on each piece. Can be used for either pvp or anything in general
